sportsmanship.en: She showed good sportsmanship by congratulating the winner.
sportsmanship.zh: 她恭喜了贏家，展現了良好的運動家精神。

spotlight.en: The singer stood under the spotlight.

spur.en: The prize spurred them to work harder.

stabilize.en: The medicine helped stabilize his heart.
stabilize.zh: 這藥幫助穩定了他的心臟。

stagger.en: He staggered under the heavy load.

staple.en: Rice is a staple food in Asia.

starvation.zh: 乾旱造成大規模的飢荒。

statesman.en: He is remembered as a wise statesman.
statesman.zh: 他被視為一位睿智的政治家。

stationary.en: The car remained stationary at the red light.
stationary.zh: 車子在紅燈前靜止不動。

stationery.en: She bought pens and other stationery.

stature.en: He is a man of short stature but great courage.
stature.zh: 他身材矮小但勇氣過人。

stepchild.en: She loves her stepchild as her own.
stepchild.zh: 她把繼子女當親生的一樣疼愛。

stepfather.en: His stepfather taught him to fish.

stepmother.en: Her stepmother is kind and caring.
stepmother.zh: 她的繼母既親切又貼心。

stimulation.en: Babies need plenty of stimulation to learn.
stimulation.zh: 寶寶需要大量的刺激來學習。

strait.en: Ships pass through the narrow strait.
strait.zh: 船隻通過這條狹窄的海峽。

strangle.zh: 雜草會扼殺幼苗的生長。

stray.en: They took in a stray cat.
stray.zh: 他們收留了一隻流浪貓。

stride.en: He crossed the room in a few strides.

stroll.en: We took a stroll along the beach.

stutter.en: He began to stutter when nervous.

stylish.en: She wore a stylish new coat.
stylish.zh: 她穿著一件時髦的新外套。

subordinate.en: He treated his subordinates with respect.
subordinate.zh: 他尊重地對待他的下屬。

subscribe.en: She subscribes to a science magazine.
subscribe.zh: 她訂閱了一本科學雜誌。

succession.en: She won three games in succession.

successive.en: It rained for three successive days.

suffocate.en: Plants can suffocate without fresh air.
suffocate.zh: 植物沒有新鮮空氣會窒息。

suitcase.en: She packed her suitcase for the trip.
suitcase.zh: 她為旅行打包了行李箱。

superficial.zh: 這個傷口只是表皮輕傷。

superintendent.en: The superintendent runs all the schools.
superintendent.zh: 這位督學管理所有學校。

superiority.en: The team showed their superiority on the field.
superiority.zh: 這支隊伍在場上展現了他們的優勢。

superstitious.en: She is superstitious about the number four.

supplement.en: He takes a vitamin supplement daily.
supplement.zh: 他每天服用維他命補充品。

suppress.en: She tried to suppress a yawn.

surge.en: There was a surge of energy after the rest.

surpass.zh: 她的分數超越了所有人。

suspense.en: The movie kept us in suspense.
suspense.zh: 這部電影讓我們一直緊張不已。

suspension.en: The suspension of the game lasted an hour.

swamp.en: Frogs live in the muddy swamp.
swamp.zh: 青蛙住在泥濘的沼澤裡。

swarm.en: A swarm of bees flew past us.
swarm.zh: 一群蜜蜂從我們身邊飛過。

symmetry.zh: 這棟建築有完美的對稱。

symphony.en: The orchestra played a famous symphony.
symphony.zh: 管弦樂團演奏了一首著名的交響曲。

synthetic.en: The jacket is made of synthetic material.
synthetic.zh: 這件外套是用合成材料做的。

syrup.en: She poured syrup over the pancakes.

tan.en: He got a deep tan at the beach.

tedious.en: Copying the list was a tedious task.
tedious.zh: 抄寫這份清單是件乏味的工作。

telecommunications.en: She works in the telecommunications industry.

teller.en: The bank teller counted the money.

tempo.en: The song has a fast tempo.

tenant.en: The tenant pays rent every month.

tentative.en: We made a tentative plan for Sunday.
tentative.zh: 我們為星期天訂了一個暫定的計畫。

terrace.en: We had dinner on the terrace.

textile.en: The town is famous for its textile industry.
textile.zh: 這個城鎮以紡織業聞名。

thereafter.en: He left school and worked thereafter.
thereafter.zh: 他離開學校，此後就開始工作。

tilt.en: She tilted her head to listen.

tiptoe.en: She walked on tiptoe so as not to wake the baby.
tiptoe.zh: 她踮著腳走路以免吵醒寶寶。

token.en: He gave her a flower as a token of thanks.
token.zh: 他送她一朵花作為謝意的象徵。

tornado.en: A tornado tore through the small town.
tornado.zh: 一場龍捲風橫掃過這個小鎮。

trademark.en: The logo is a registered trademark.

transcript.en: She sent her transcript to the college.
transcript.zh: 她把成績單寄給了大學。

transmit.en: The station transmits the signal far away.
transmit.zh: 這個電台把訊號傳送到很遠的地方。

transplant.en: He had a heart transplant last year.
transplant.zh: 他去年接受了心臟移植。

treasury.en: The gold was kept in the royal treasury.
treasury.zh: 黃金被保存在皇家國庫裡。

trek.en: They made a long trek through the jungle.
trek.zh: 他們在叢林中長途跋涉。

trifle.en: Don't waste time on such a trifle.
trifle.zh: 別把時間浪費在這種小事上。

trillion.en: The galaxy has trillions of stars.
trillion.zh: 這個星系有數兆顆星星。

tropic.en: Bananas grow well in the tropics.
tropic.zh: 香蕉在熱帶地區長得好。

trout.en: He caught a trout in the cold stream.
trout.zh: 他在清冷的溪流裡釣到一條鱒魚。

trustee.en: The trustee manages the school's money.
trustee.zh: 受託人管理學校的資金。

tuck.en: She tucked the blanket around the child.
tuck.zh: 她把毯子塞在孩子身邊。

turmoil.en: The country was in political turmoil.
turmoil.zh: 這個國家處於政治動盪中。

twilight.en: The birds returned home at twilight.

twinkle.en: The stars twinkle in the night sky.

underneath.en: The cat hid underneath the bed.

underpass.en: We walked through the underpass to cross.

underway.zh: 這個專案已經在進行中了。

unification.en: The unification of the two groups took time.
unification.zh: 這兩個團體的統合花了一些時間。

unify.en: A common goal can unify a team.
unify.zh: 共同的目標能團結一支隊伍。

unveil.en: The company unveiled its new phone.
unveil.zh: 這家公司發表了它的新手機。

upright.en: Please sit upright in your chair.

urgency.en: Her voice was full of urgency.
urgency.zh: 她的聲音充滿了急迫感。

usher.en: An usher showed us to our seats.
usher.zh: 一位引座員帶我們到座位。

utensil.en: A spoon is a common kitchen utensil.
utensil.zh: 湯匙是常見的廚房用具。

utter.en: She did not utter a single word.

vaccine.en: The vaccine protects against the virus.
vaccine.zh: 這種疫苗能預防這種病毒。

vanilla.en: I'd like a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
vanilla.zh: 我想要一球香草冰淇淋。

vanity.en: His vanity made him buy expensive clothes.
vanity.zh: 他的虛榮心讓他買昂貴的衣服。

vapor.en: Water turns to vapor when it boils.
vapor.zh: 水沸騰時會變成水蒸氣。

veil.en: The bride wore a white veil.

velvet.en: The box was lined with soft velvet.
velvet.zh: 這個盒子內襯著柔軟的天鵝絨。

versatile.en: She is a versatile player who can play any position.
versatile.zh: 她是個能勝任任何位置的全能球員。

veterinarian-vet.en: We took our dog to the vet.

veto.en: The president used his veto on the bill.
veto.zh: 總統對這項法案行使了否決權。

vibrate.en: The phone began to vibrate on the table.

vibration.en: You can feel the vibration of the engine.
vibration.zh: 你可以感覺到引擎的震動。

victor.en: The victor raised the trophy high.

vigor.en: She tackled the task with vigor.
vigor.zh: 她精力充沛地處理這項任務。

vigorous.en: He took a vigorous morning walk.
vigorous.zh: 他早晨健步如飛地走了一趟。

villa.en: They rented a villa by the sea.
villa.zh: 他們在海邊租了一棟別墅。

villain.en: The villain in the story was defeated.
villain.zh: 故事裡的壞蛋被打敗了。

vineyard.en: They make wine from this vineyard.
vineyard.zh: 他們用這座葡萄園的葡萄釀酒。

virgin.zh: 他們探索那片原始森林。

vitality.en: The children are full of vitality.

wag.en: The happy dog wagged its tail.
wag.zh: 那隻開心的狗搖著尾巴。

walnut.en: She added walnuts to the cake.

ward.en: The nurse works in the children's ward.
ward.zh: 這位護士在兒童病房工作。

wardrobe.en: Her clothes hang in the wardrobe.

warrant.en: His behavior does not warrant such anger.
warrant.zh: 他的行為不值得這麼生氣。

warranty.en: The phone comes with a one-year warranty.
warranty.zh: 這支手機附有一年的保固。

waterproof.en: She wore a waterproof jacket in the rain.
waterproof.zh: 她在雨中穿著防水外套。

weary.en: The travelers were weary after the long trip.
weary.zh: 旅人在長途旅行後疲憊不堪。

wharf.en: The boat was tied to the wharf.

whiskey-whisky.en: The bar sells whiskey to adults only.
whiskey-whisky.zh: 這家酒吧只賣威士忌給成年人。

wholesale.en: They buy goods at wholesale prices.
wholesale.zh: 他們以批發價購買商品。

wholesome.en: The meal was simple but wholesome.
wholesome.zh: 這頓飯簡單但健康營養。

widow-widower.en: The kind widow lived next door.
widow-widower.zh: 那位親切的寡婦住在隔壁。

withhold.en: She decided to withhold the bad news.
withhold.zh: 她決定先不說那個壞消息。

woe.en: He told us all his woes.
woe.zh: 他把所有的苦惱都告訴了我們。

woodpecker.en: A woodpecker tapped on the tree.
woodpecker.zh: 一隻啄木鳥在樹上啄個不停。

workforce.en: The factory has a large workforce.
workforce.zh: 這家工廠有龐大的勞動力。

wrestle.en: The two boys wrestled on the grass.
wrestle.zh: 兩個男孩在草地上摔角。

wrinkle.en: She ironed the wrinkles out of the shirt.
wrinkle.zh: 她把襯衫上的皺褶燙平。

yearn.en: She yearned to see her family again.

yoga.en: She does yoga to stay calm and flexible.
yoga.zh: 她做瑜珈來保持平靜與柔軟。

yogurt.en: He eats yogurt with fruit for breakfast.

zoom.en: The camera can zoom in on distant objects.
zoom.zh: 這台相機能拉近拍攝遠處的物體。
